events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: condenser/heat pump setting on a commercial project, rough-complete stage. Observed field condition: no service disconnect within sight. Reference: mfr install manual, IMC/IRC M1401.

Codes require a disconnecting means within sight of the equipment and accessible. IMC M1401 / NEC 440 requires disconnect within sight of motor-compressor, typically within sight and not more than 50 ft. No service disconnect within sight is non-compliant.

Decision: fail. Risk: high (electrical safety hazard during servicing). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 85. Value: 0 (no disconnect within sight). Confidence high.

Write JSON.

"findings": [
"No service disconnect located within sight of the condenser/heat pump unit.",
"Required equipment disconnecting means is missing or not visible from the unit, creating an unsafe servicing condition."
],
"actions": [
"Install a listed service disconnect within sight of and accessible from the condenser/heat pump.",
"Verify disconnect is properly rated, lockable, and meets manufacturer and code clearances before final inspection."
],
"rationale": "IMC/IRC M1401 and manufacturer installation requirements require an accessible disconnecting means within sight of HVAC equipment. With no disconnect within sight, the installation is non-compliant and unsafe for service/maintenance.",
"references": [
"IMC/IRC M1401",
"mfr install manual"
]
}
